title: Dario Amodei 发布新文论 AI 指数级增长与政策鸿沟
full_text:
Dario Amodei on X: "Today I'm publishing a new essay, Policy on the AI Exponential. AI is progressing extremely fast—much faster than the policy process was built to handle. The essay lays out where I think the technology is now, and the action needed to close the gap: https://t.co/Lh6PWae178" / X
Post

Post
Dario Amodei
@DarioAmodei
Today I'm publishing a new essay, Policy on the AI Exponential. AI is progressing extremely fast—much faster than the policy process was built to handle. The essay lays out where I think the technology is now, and the action needed to close the gap:
Dario Amodei — Policy on the AI Exponential
